title: Kafka Self-Managed Clusters on GCP
description: Led the design and delivery of five self-managed Confluent Community Kafka clusters on Google Cloud Platform — one development, two staging, and two production environments. Managed a team of seven developers from CGI to build repeatable, automated infrastructure across all tiers.
details: 2024 · Team of 7 · 5 clusters (1 DEV · 2 STG · 2 PROD)
